Variables.Name: RandomSeed
Variables.Description: The seed used for generating the randomness of the simulation.

Variables.Name: TileSize
Variables.Description: Length of the tile (in cm) along one axis. The total area of the tile will be TileSizeTileSize.

Variables.Name: NumUniqueTiles
Variables.Description: The number of unique tiles to generate. The final simulation is a procedurally determined combination of the various unique tiles.

Variables.Name: MinimumQuadTreeSize
Variables.Description: Minimum size of the quad tree used during the simulation. Reduce if too many instances are in splittable leaf quads (as warned in the log).

Variables.Name: FoliageTypes
Variables.Description: The types of foliage to procedurally spawn.
